name: The Wounded Owlbear
description: You hear a pained screeching ahead. In a small clearing, a massive owlbear is pinned beneath a fallen tree, its leg bleeding heavily.

initial.text: The creature snaps its beak at you weakly. It's dangerous, but clearly suffering.

choices.label: [Athletics 15] Brute force the trunk off the leg.
Use a Crowbar to lever the tree up.
[Evil] Put it out of its misery and take the pelt.

free-owlbear-check.success_text: With a massive heave, you lift the trunk just enough for the creature to slide its leg out.
free-owlbear-check.failure_text: The tree is too heavy. The movement only further panics the beast!

free-owlbear.text: The owlbear drags itself free and limps into the deep forest, leaving behind a tuft of enchanted fur as it disappears into the brush.

calm-owlbear.text: You speak in low, soothing tones. The creature's feathers settle, and it allows you to approach safely.

choices.label: [Medicine 12] Bind the wound and free it.
Use a Potion of Healing on its wound.

free-owlbear-blessed.text: The magic of the potion knits the bone and flesh together instantly. The owlbear stands, nuzzles your hand briefly, and leaves you a glowing feather before vanishing.

combat-mercy-kill.text: You prepare to strike the finishing blow, but the creature finds a last burst of adrenaline!

mercy-kill-loot.text: The creature lies still. You skin it for its valuable fur.

sneak-past-check.success_text: You move silently past the clearing, leaving the beast to its fate.
sneak-past-check.failure_text: You snap a dry twig! The owlbear's head whips around, its eyes bloodshot with pain and rage.

anger-owlbear.text: The creature's panic flares and it lashes out with a powerful claw!
